div1.entryFree: Denote, to indicate, to mark: love doth well d. love's eye is not so true as all men's No, Sonn. 148, 7. to d. her to the doctor, Wiv. IV, 6, 39. thy acts d. the fury of a beast, Rom. III, 3, 110. shapes of grief that can d. me truly, Hml. I, 2, 83. this --d a foregone conclusion, Oth. III, 3, 428. his own courses will d. him so, IV, 1, 290.
